title: Forever ever
description: A compact motion artifact marking a hard day, yoga sweat, and clean sober movement as a brief forward declaration.

motifMap.meaning: Bodily effort becomes the evidence of movement through a hard day.
The final line records sobriety as a concrete forward state rather than an abstract promise.

excerpt: For real for real. Hot shot. Mic drop. Hard day. Yoga sweats. Clean and sober.

associatedMedia.description: Screenshot of the published Substack post page, if available in the local screenshot archive. Screenshot capture remains optional provenance support and was not required for validation in this run.
associatedMedia.altText: A short Wanderer's Burn Substack post titled 'Forever ever' by Unnamed, published May 18, 2026, saying for real, hard day, yoga sweats, clean and sober.

editHistory.notes: Self-discovered v2.6.5 batch run. Classified as Desert Faith with Motion because the artifact records hard-day endurance through bodily movement, yoga, and sobriety.

integrity.notes: Filename: 2026-05-18.forever-ever.phase-desert-faith.variant-motion.metadata.v2.6.5.json. Variant assignment follows v2.6.5 phase-variant compatibility.
